# Nevio Lab

> Nevio Lab is a done-for-you CDL driver acquisition agency built exclusively for trucking companies. We help carriers fill open seats in 30 days using targeted paid ads, optimized landing pages, and automated applicant follow-up.

## What We Do

Nevio Lab runs the full driver recruiting marketing system for trucking companies — from the first ad impression to a qualified applicant in the carrier's inbox. We do not offer general marketing services. Every service is built specifically for the trucking industry.

## Who We Serve

Small to mid-size trucking companies (5–200 trucks) struggling with chronic driver vacancies, high turnover, or over-reliance on expensive job boards.

## Core Services

- **CDL Driver Acquisition**: Done-for-you recruiting campaigns on Facebook, Instagram, and Google. We build the targeting, write the ads, build the landing page, and set up automated lead follow-up.
- **Paid Advertising for Trucking**: Full-funnel paid ad management for driver recruiting and freight sales.
- **Trucking Social Media**: Employer brand content that attracts drivers organically.
- **Trucking Website Design**: Conversion-optimized websites built for trucking companies.

- Homepage: https://neviolab.com/

- Why Trucking Companies Lose Drivers to Competitors: https://neviolab.com/blog/why-trucking-companies-lose-drivers

- How to Lower Cost-Per-Hire as a Trucking Company: https://neviolab.com/blog/how-to-lower-cost-per-hire-trucking
- Facebook Ads for CDL Driver Recruiting: https://neviolab.com/blog/facebook-ads-for-trucking-companies
- Driver Retention Starts in the Hiring Process: https://neviolab.com/blog/driver-retention-starts-before-hiring

## Key Facts

- Niche: Trucking industry only — not a general marketing agency
- Specialization: CDL driver recruitment marketing
- Model: Done-for-you (carrier doesn't manage ads or tools)
- Typical result: Qualified CDL applicants within 30 days of launch
- Location: United States
